description: Partial delivery invoice for 60% of PO quantity shipped with outstanding balance and partial acceptance noted
parsed_text:
PARTIAL SHIPMENT INVOICE
Invoice #: INV-2025-7720
Invoice Date: 2025-08-20   Due Date: 2025-09-19
Vendor: Overland Textile Mills Inc.
Vendor Tax ID: XX-XXX4453
Vendor Address: 500 Mill Creek Road, Greenville, SC 29601
Bill To: Northern Apparel Distributors LLC
   Purchasing Department
   3300 Garment District Way, Chicago, IL 60654
Purchase Order: PO-NAD-20250701
Shipment Reference: SHIP-2025-4490
Payment Terms: Net 30   Currency: USD

Note: This invoice covers Partial Delivery #1 against PO-NAD-20250701.
Total PO Quantity: 10,000 units. Shipped this delivery: 6,000 units (60%).
Remaining balance of 4,000 units (40%) to follow per confirmed delivery schedule of 2025-09-15.

Line Items (Partial Delivery #1 — 60% of PO):
1. Men's Crewneck T-Shirt White S/M/L/XL Assort (SKU: TEX-MCN-WH)
   PO Qty: 4,000 | Shipped: 2,400 @ $6.80 ea              $16,320.00
2. Men's Crewneck T-Shirt Black S/M/L/XL Assort (SKU: TEX-MCN-BK)
   PO Qty: 3,500 | Shipped: 2,100 @ $6.80 ea              $14,280.00
3. Men's Polo Shirt Navy Blue M/L/XL (SKU: TEX-MPL-NV)
   PO Qty: 2,500 | Shipped: 1,500 @ $11.40 ea             $17,100.00

Subtotal (Partial Delivery):                               $47,700.00
Sales Tax: $0.00 (wholesale resale exemption)
Freight — Truckload to Chicago:                             $1,840.00
Invoice Total:                                             $49,540.00
Amount Due This Invoice:                                   $49,540.00

Estimated Balance Invoice (Delivery #2, ~$33,100 + freight): to be issued 2025-09-20.
Partial acceptance confirmed per Buyer acknowledgment form NAD-ACK-7720.
Questions: invoices@overlandtextile.com | 864-555-0311
